description_long: This object is a humanoid figure dressed in full combat tactical gear, including a green armored vest and camouflage-patterned uniform. The figure is bald, wearing black gloves and boots, and is holding a large green and black rifle vertically against its right shoulder. The armor appears to cover the chest, shoulders, and back, providing substantial protection. The camouflage pattern is a mix of green, brown, and gray, designed to blend into urban or woodland environments. No visible vehicle chassis, wheels, or tracks are present, as this is a human soldier equipped for tactical operations.
description: A combat-ready soldier in green armor and camouflage, holding a large rifle upright. The figure is fully equipped with protective gear and tactical attire.
description_view_0: Front view shows the armored vest, camouflage uniform, and the rifle held upright against the right shoulder.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the helmetless head, the thickness of the armor, and the full length of the rifle.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back armor plating and the continuation of the camouflage pattern, with the rifle visible behind the shoulder.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the figure's profile, the grip on the rifle, and the layered armor on the torso.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One visible weapon mount: a large rifle held in the right hand, no vehicle-mounted hardpoints visible.
attribute_armor_plating: Visible armor plating covers the chest, shoulders, and back, appearing moderately thick and contoured for body protection.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Woodland-style camouflage with green, brown, gray, and beige irregular shapes.
